# BSET

`BSET` (Bayesian Surrogate Evaluation Test) is an `R` package for
assessing the validity of surrogate markers in clinical trials. It
provides hypothesis testing tools to evaluate whether a surrogate can
reliably estimate the causal effect of a treatment on a primary outcome.
The package implements the imputation-based Bayesian methodology of
Carlotti and Parast (2026), extending the frequentist rank-based
approach of Parast et al. (2024). BSET addresses key limitations of the
frequentist method, including the lack of causal interpretability and
the inability to adjust for covariates in the estimation process.

The package supports Bayesian testing both with and without baseline
covariates. Additionally, it includes comprehensive simulation suites to
replicate studies from both papers, enabling performance comparisons
between Bayesian and frequentist approaches across diverse clinical
scenarios.

For a detailed walkthrough and examples of the imputation-based
methodology, please visit the [BSET
Tutorial](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/PietroCarlotti/BSET/blob/main/docs/articles/BSET_tutorial.html).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`BSET()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/BSET.md) :
  Bayesian Surrogate Evaluation Test from Carlotti and Parast (2026)
- [`Bayesian_test()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/Bayesian_test.md)
  : Bayesian Test from Carlotti and Parast (2026)
- [`Carlotti_and_Parast_2026_simulations_grid`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/Carlotti_and_Parast_2026_simulations_grid.md)
  : Simulation grid for Carlotti and Parast (2026)
- [`DGP_X_Gaussian()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/DGP_X_Gaussian.md)
  : Data Generating Process with a Gaussian Covariate
- [`DGP_X_binary()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/DGP_X_binary.md)
  : Data Generating Process with a Binary Covariate
- [`DGP_no_X()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/DGP_no_X.md)
  : Data Generating Process without Baseline Covariates
- [`Parast_et_al_2024_simulations_grid`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/Parast_et_al_2024_simulations_grid.md)
  : Simulation grid for Parast et al. (2024)
- [`compute_BF_distribution()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/compute_BF_distribution.md)
  : Compute the Distribution of the Bayes Factor from Carlotti and
  Parast (2026)
- [`compute_V_S_star()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/compute_V_S_star.md)
  : Compute \\v_S\\ from Carlotti and Parast (2026)
- [`compute_delta()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/compute_delta.md)
  : Monte Carlo Computation of the Parameter \\\delta\\ from Parast et
  al. (2024)
- [`compute_estimands_Carlotti_and_Parast_2026()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/compute_estimands_Carlotti_and_Parast_2026.md)
  : Monte Carlo Computation of the Estimands for the Simulation Study in
  Carlotti and Parast (2026)
- [`compute_estimands_Parast_et_al_2024()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/compute_estimands_Parast_et_al_2024.md)
  : Monte Carlo Computation of the Estimands for the Simulation Study in
  Parast et al. (2024)
- [`compute_theta()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/compute_theta.md)
  : Monte Carlo Computation of the Parameter \\\theta\\ from Carlotti
  and Parast (2026)
- [`estimands_Carlotti_and_Parast_2026`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/estimands_Carlotti_and_Parast_2026.md)
  : True estimands for Carlotti and Parast (2026)
- [`estimands_Parast_et_al_2024`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/estimands_Parast_et_al_2024.md)
  : True estimands for Parast et al. (2024)
- [`frequentist_test()`](https://pietrocarlotti.github.io/BSET/reference/frequentist_test.md)
  : Frequentist Test from Parast et al. (2024)
